subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth the truth amidst all created things and guideth all unto His straight path. Verily, the Announcement hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق بین الخلق و یهدی الکل الی صراطه المستقیم قد اتی النبا
